title: chloropyron parryi
intro: Chloropyron parryi, also known as the Parry's lomatium or Parry's biscuitroot, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Chloropyron parryi include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Chloropyron parryi can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal properties.
